LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: Page Header with Title and Action Buttons
LightningComponentBundle.description: A page header component that displays a title, optional subtitle, and configurable action buttons following SLDS 2 design patterns. Includes accessibility features and responsive design.

property.name: title
property.label: Page Title
property.description: The main title displayed in the page header

property.name: subtitle
property.label: Subtitle
property.description: Optional subtitle text displayed below the main title

property.name: showActions
property.label: Show Actions
property.description: Controls whether action buttons are displayed
